info.title: Internship Portal API
info.description: REST API for internship applications, profiles, authentication, and admin workflows.

post.summary: Registers a new student account and returns a JWT access token.
Registers a new admin account and returns a JWT access token.
Authenticates a user and returns a JWT access token.
Generates a password reset token and sends the reset link by email.
Resets a password using a valid reset token.
Changes the password for the currently authenticated user.

get.summary: Gets a single internship by its identifier.
Gets internships that the current student is eligible for.
Gets internships already applied to by the current student.

post.summary: Applies the current student to an internship.

get.summary:
Gets all internship applications (admin). Can be filtered by internshipId via query string.
Example: GET /api/internships/applications or GET /api/internships/applications?internshipId=5

Bearer.description: Enter a valid JWT token in the form: Bearer {token}

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Handles authentication, registration, and password management endpoints.

tags.name: Internships
tags.description: Handles internship browsing, application, review, and admin maintenance operations.

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: Exposes the authenticated user's profile information.
